headline: CareDx (CDNA) Moves 35.6% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: CareDx (CDNA) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.

headline: Why Is Intuitive Surgical Stock Sinking Friday?
summary: ISRG stock drops 11% as Intuitive Surgical beats Q2 estimates but warns insurance changes could slow U.S. procedure growth.
